full_text:
Cao Hui 曹徽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Hui (曹徽)was born in Pei. Maintained his uncle Cao Yu’s line. When Cao Cao died, he went hunting until reined in. Cao Hui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Hui lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
